glosses.vi: sự tiếp tục lại; khởi động lại

sentences.target: La reprise du travail me stresse.

translations.fr: La reprise du travail me stresse.
translations.en: Going back to work stresses me out.
translations.es: La vuelta al trabajo me estresa.
translations.de: Die Rückkehr zur Arbeit stresst mich.
translations.it: Il ritorno al lavoro mi stressa.
translations.zh-Hans: 重返工作让我感到压力。
translations.tr: İşe geri dönmek beni strese sokuyor.
translations.vi: Quay lại làm việc khiến tôi căng thẳng.
translations.ar: العودة إلى العمل تُسبب لي التوتر.
translations.nl: De terugkeer naar het werk bezorgt me stress.
translations.uk: Повернення до роботи викликає у мене стрес.
translations.hi: काम पर वापस जाना मुझे तनाव देता है.
translations.el: Η επιστροφή στη δουλειά με αγχώνει.
translations.nb: Å gå tilbake på jobb stresser meg.
translations.sv: Att gå tillbaka till jobbet stressar mig.
translations.da: At komme tilbage på arbejde stresser mig.
translations.ja: 仕事に戻るのはストレスです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'reprise' (subject NP).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP meaning 'return/resumption'.
Preposition (contraction of 'de + le'); introduces the nominal complement 'du travail' modifying 'reprise'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du', specifying the domain of the resumption.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object (COD) of the verb 'stresse'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with subject 'La reprise du travail'.

sentences.target: On prépare la reprise des cours demain.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁepaʁ la ʁəpʁiz de kuʁ dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: On prépare la reprise des cours demain.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁepaʁ la ʁəpʁiz de kuʁ dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re getting ready for classes starting again tomorrow.
translations.es: Nos estamos preparando para la vuelta a clases mañana.
translations.de: Wir bereiten uns darauf vor, dass morgen der Unterricht wieder beginnt.
translations.it: Ci stiamo preparando per la ripresa delle lezioni domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为明天复课做准备。
translations.yue: 我哋正為聽日復課做準備。
translations.ru: Мы готовимся к возобновлению занятий завтра.
translations.pt: Estamos nos preparando para a retomada das aulas amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chuẩn bị cho việc học bắt đầu lại vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: We bereiden ons voor op de hervatting van de lessen morgen.
translations.uk: Ми готуємося до відновлення занять завтра.
translations.hi: हम कल से फिर से शुरू होने वाली कक्षाओं की तैयारी कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Przygotowujemy się do wznowienia zajęć jutro.
translations.el: Ετοιμαζόμαστε για την επανέναρξη των μαθημάτων αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi gjør oss klare til että undervisningen starter igjen i morgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang bersiap untuk dimulainya kembali kelas besok.
translations.sv: Vi förbereder oss för att lektionerna börjar igen i morgon.
translations.ro: Ne pregătim pentru reluarea cursurilor mâine.
translations.cs: Připravujeme se na to, že zítra znovu začnou hodiny.
translations.da: Vi forbereder os på, at undervisningen starter igen i morgen.
translations.fi: Valmistaudumme siihen, että tunnit alkavat taas huomenna.
translations.ja: 明日の授業再開に向けて準備しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal pronoun used for generic 'we/one'; subject of the sentence (3rd singular).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the direct object 'la reprise des cours'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'reprise' (direct object NP).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object NP meaning 'return/resumption'.
Preposition (contraction of 'de + les'); introduces the complement 'des cours' modifying 'reprise'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'des', specifying which resumption.
Temporal adverb; modifies 'prépare' to indicate time.

sentences.target: Il adore faire une reprise au karaoké.
sentences.reading: /il adɔʁ fɛʁ yn ʁəpʁiz o kaʁaɔke/

translations.fr: Il adore faire une reprise au karaoké.
translations.ipa: /il adɔʁ fɛʁ yn ʁəpʁiz o kaʁaɔke/
translations.en: He loves doing a cover at karaoke.
translations.es: Le encanta hacer una versión en el karaoke.
translations.de: Er liebt es, beim Karaoke eine Coverversion zu singen.
translations.it: Adora cantare una cover al karaoke.
translations.ko: 그는 노래방에서 커버곡을 부르는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.ru: Он любит исполнять каверы на караоке.
translations.pt: Ele adora cantar covers no karaokê.
translations.he: הוא אוהב לשיר גרסאות כיסוי בקריוקי.
translations.tr: Karaokede cover şarkı söylemeyi çok seviyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thích hát bài cover ở karaoke.
translations.ar: هو يحب أداء أغانٍ معاد تقديمها في الكاراوكي.
translations.nl: Hij houdt ervan om bij karaoke een cover te zingen.
translations.uk: Він любить виконувати кавери на караоке.
translations.hi: उसे कराओके में कवर गाने गाना पसंद है.
translations.el: Του αρέσει να τραγουδάει διασκευές στο καραόκε.
translations.nb: Han elsker å synge coverlåter på karaoke.
translations.id: Dia suka menyanyikan lagu cover di karaoke.
translations.sv: Han älskar att sjunga covers på karaoke.
translations.ro: Îi place să cânte coveruri la karaoke.
translations.da: Han elsker at synge covernumre til karaoke.
translations.ja: 彼はカラオケでカバー曲を歌うのが大好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'adore'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'reprise'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'faire', here meaning a song 'cover'.
Preposition (contraction of 'à + le'); introduces the PP 'au karaoké'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the activity/location.

sentences.target: À la reprise ils marquent vite.

translations.fr: À la reprise ils marquent vite.
translations.en: At the restart, they score quickly.
translations.de: Nach dem Wiederanpfiff treffen sie schnell.
translations.zh-Hans: 重新开球后他们很快就得分。
translations.yue: 一開波佢哋好快就入波。
translations.tr: Yeniden başladıktan sonra hızlıca gol atıyorlar.
translations.vi: Ngay khi trận đấu bắt đầu lại, họ ghi bàn nhanh.
translations.nl: Bij de herstart scoren ze snel.
translations.uk: Після відновлення гри вони швидко забивають.
translations.hi: पुनः आरंभ होते ही वे जल्दी गोल कर देते हैं.
translations.id: Saat pertandingan dimulai lagi, mereka cepat mencetak gol.
translations.sv: Efter återstarten gör de snabbt mål.
translations.cs: Po obnovení hry rychle dávají gól.
translations.fi: Uudelleenaloituksen jälkeen he tekevät nopeasti maalin.
translations.ja: 再開直後に彼らはすぐ得点する。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; introduces the temporal prepositional phrase 'À la reprise'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'reprise' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP, here meaning the restart/resumption (e.g., after a break).
Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'ils'.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'marquent'.
